metadata.name: New Faculty Onboarding and Tech Setup

description: A new faculty member, as part of their onboarding, needs to get their ID card and have their office computer set up.

nodes.task_description: As part of the HR onboarding checklist, direct the new faculty to the campus card office to have their photo taken and ID issued.

expected_outcome.value: HR agent provides clear directions and instructions.

nodes.task_description: After the ID is issued, the card office system automatically generates an IT support ticket.

expected_outcome.value: A ticket is created for desktop support to set up the new faculty's computer.

nodes.task_description: The IT technician uses the ticket to schedule a setup appointment with the new faculty member.

expected_outcome.value: IT schedules and completes the computer setup.
